Package battleship.view

Class Battleship

java.lang.Object
processing.core.PApplet
battleship.view.Battleship
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBattleshipView, processing.core.PConstants
public class Battleship extends processing.core.PApplet implements IBattleshipView
View class of Battleship that contains all methods and variables to show the game. These are ol for how to draw game scenes. Battleship instance created MainAny with the help of newAny() method. newAny(String ip, int port) It creates a 'Battleship thread' either as 'Server' or 'Client' with the help of newAny() method of ClientServerThread class. ClientServerThread.newAny(String, int, Battleship) So that game is drawn and threads start to listen network and depending on action to send messages.

    Method
    Description
    void
    draw()
    Shows the game scenes depending on GameState.
    private void
    drawCards()
    Draws the GameCards with the help of drawGameCards(List) drawEnemyCards() drawHandCards() That is handled by controller with the help of BattleshipController.nextFrame()

    Draws the cards in 4*3 Bloc.

    Shows the current game state of Battleship.

    Shows the game over screen of Battleship.

    drawHandCards()
    Draws the HandCards in a line.

    drawInfoBox(int r1, int g1, int b1, int r2, int g2, int b2, String text, float stroke, int x1, int y1, int width, int height, int textSize, int x2, int y2)
    Draws the info boxes on Game Screen depending on Parameters.

  • Constructor Details

    • Battleship

      public Battleship()
      Creates a new Processing view of Battleship.

  • Method Details

    • settings

      public void settings()
      Sets the size of game. It is default 1000*1000.
      Overrides:
      settings in class processing.core.PApplet

    • setup

      public void setup()
      Initial setup of game. For that used following methods of Battleship. initializeVariables() setTeam() loadSetupImages() loadEnemyImages() titleScreenController()
      Overrides:
      setup in class processing.core.PApplet

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Shows the game scenes depending on GameState. This occurs with the help of IBattleshipController.nextFrame()
      Overrides:
      draw in class processing.core.PApplet

    • newAny

      public static Battleship newAny(String ip, int port)
      Creates either a server or client thread and assign this to game of Battleship. Returns this game of Battleship as server or client.
      Parameters:
      ip - IP to connect to
      port - Port to connect to
      Returns:
      game of battleship (Processing view)

    • keyPressed

      public void keyPressed()
      Control method for pressed keys. Depending on key calls the corresponding methods of thread or view. ClientServerThread.send(Object) setNewSelection(int)
      Overrides:
      keyPressed in class processing.core.PApplet

    • mouseReleased

      public void mouseReleased()
      Control method for mouse release. Depending on statements it calls the IBattleshipController.userInputE(int, int) or IBattleshipController.userInputO(int, int)
      Overrides:
      mouseReleased in class processing.core.PApplet

    • drawTitleScreen

      public void drawTitleScreen()
      Shows the title screen of Battleship.
      Specified by:
      drawTitleScreen in interface IBattleshipView

    • drawGame

      public void drawGame()
      Shows the current game state of Battleship. This display should display the cards images of GameCards, EnemyCards and HandCards. Also, player names and the infoBoxes for player. If the cards updated, this will also update the images of cards.
      Specified by:
      drawGame in interface IBattleshipView

    • drawGG

      public void drawGG()
      Shows the game over screen of Battleship.
      Specified by:
      drawGG in interface IBattleshipView

    • loadImages

      public void loadImages(List<Cards> gameC, List<Cards> handC)
      This method takes the load the images of GameCards and first five HandCards. It takes the paths from lists of Game with the help of controller. It has not direct access on model.
      Specified by:
      loadImages in interface IBattleshipView
      Parameters:
      gameC - the list of GameCards.
      handC - the list of HandCards.

    • setEnemyName

      public void setEnemyName(String enemyN)
      Sets the name of enemy, if thread receives the name of other player. This will be only by start.
      Parameters:
      enemyN - name of the enemy player.

    • setEnemyCards

      public void setEnemyCards(CardsG cardsG)
      Sets the enemy cards with help of the controller. IBattleshipController.setEnemyCards(ArrayList) if thread receives the CardList of other side
      Parameters:
      cardsG - that contains gameCardsList of other side.

    • updateSelfCard

      public void updateSelfCard(PlayedCardE pC)
      Updates the self card, on which by enemy played, with help of the controller. IBattleshipController.updateSelfCard(int, Cards)
      Parameters:
      pC - that contains card of other side.

    • updateECardDefence

      public void updateECardDefence(PlayedCardIO pCI)
      Updates the defence information of other side, with the help of controller. IBattleshipController.enemyCards()
      Parameters:
      pCI - that contains information of updated card of other side.

    • setWinnerText

      public void setWinnerText()
      Sets the winnerText, if thread receives from other side the String 'YOU'. So the side is winner, which 'YOU' send and send to other side information to set the Game Over too.

    • setTurn

      public void setTurn()
      Set the turn true, if thread receives the String 'TURN'. After each turn, it has been sent to unlock the other side. So that the player can play.

    • initializeVariables

      private void initializeVariables()
      Initializes the all setup variables.

    • setTeam

      private void setTeam()
      Set the color of team and turn. If thread is server team will be red and turn true. Otherwise blue and false. Starter of game is always server.

    • loadSetupImages

      private void loadSetupImages()
      Loads the setupImages 'title screen', 'game background' and 'sank ship'. Depending on team loads also the images of not opened cards for own cards and enemy cards.

    • loadEnemyImages

      private void loadEnemyImages()
      Loads the enemyCard images for the not opened cards.

    • titleScreenController

      private void titleScreenController()
      Setup method for the controller objects of controlP5. These are only on Title Screen to show. It contains also a button to set name of player, and to change the game state.

    • setNewSelection

      private void setNewSelection(int i)
      Sets the index number of selected hand cards when the keyPressed()
      Parameters:
      i - index of handCard

    • getPlayedOn

      private int getPlayedOn()
      Sets the index of own card or enemy card and what type of card is this, when mouseReleased(). (Depending on the position of mouseX and mouseY) for Example: 'e' for enemyCard and 0...11 for the index of enemyCard. 's' for enemyCard and 0...11 for the index of gameCard. These will be handed over on control with IBattleshipController.userInputE(int, int) or IBattleshipController.userInputO(int, int)
      Returns:
      index of game or enemy card, on which played.

    • updateHandC

      private void updateHandC()
      Updates the images of HandCard after each move. Because the played HandCard is deleted from the list handCards and is taken another card from the list of takeCards.

    • resetIndexes

      private void resetIndexes()
      Resets the indexes of hand- and playedCards after each successfully move.

    • updateEnemyCards

      private void updateEnemyCards(Cards enemyC, int index)
      Updates the image of enemyCard, if it is opened. And sets true if the ship is sunk or struck. Image updates occurs over controller in mouseReleased().
      Parameters:
      enemyC - the card of enemy, on which played.
      index - index of enemyCard.

    • drawCards

      private void drawCards()
      Draws the GameCards with the help of drawGameCards(List) drawEnemyCards() drawHandCards() That is handled by controller with the help of BattleshipController.nextFrame()

    • drawGameCards

      private void drawGameCards(List<Cards> gameC)
      Draws the GameCards with the help of drawGameC(List, PImage[], PImage, int, int, int) This draws cards in 4*3 bloc.
      Parameters:
      gameC -

    • drawGameC

      private void drawGameC(List<Cards> gameC, processing.core.PImage[] frontCards, processing.core.PImage backCard, int j, int k, int y)
      Draws the cards in 4*3 Bloc.
      Parameters:
      gameC - List of GameCards
      frontCards - List of images of opened cards
      backCard - image of not opened card
      j - start index of bloc
      k - end index of bloc
      y - vertical position of images

    • drawEnemyCards

      private void drawEnemyCards()
      Draws the EnemyCards with the help of drawEnemyC(PImage[], int, int, int) This draws cards in 4*3 bloc.

    • drawEnemyC

      private void drawEnemyC(processing.core.PImage[] enemyCards, int j, int k, int y)
      Draws the cards in 4*3 Bloc.
      Parameters:
      enemyCards - List of images of enemy cards
      j - start index of bloc
      k - end index of bloc
      y - vertical position of images

    • drawHandCards

      private void drawHandCards()
      Draws the HandCards in a line.

    • drawInfoBox

      private void drawInfoBox(int r1, int g1, int b1, int r2, int g2, int b2, String text, float stroke, int x1, int y1, int width, int height, int textSize, int x2, int y2)
      Draws the info boxes on Game Screen depending on Parameters.
      Parameters:
      r1 - r parameter for color of stroke
      g1 - g parameter for color of stroke
      b1 - b parameter for color of stroke
      r2 - r parameter for color of text
      g2 - g parameter for color of stroke
      b2 - b parameter for color of stroke
      text - text, that will be shown in infobox
      stroke - stroke of infobox
      x1 - horizontal position of infobox
      y1 - vertical position of infobox
      width - width of infobox
      height - height of infobox
      textSize - size of text
      x2 - horizontal position of text
      y2 - vertical position of text

    • sentPlayerName

      private void sentPlayerName()
      Sends the player name to other side. It occurs bilateral with threads. It is called in drawGame() but only at the beginning of the game, not in each frame change. Thanks to boolean variable of isSentN it is blocked to be sent in each frame.
